creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #23)
> But best fix is make "make makesum" generate correct distinfo with option G729 off.
When building from ports this will cause the G729 files to be downloaded when G729 option is off. Isn't it?  Or if you can provide example of such solution it will be very helpful.
